title: TRIM
summary: TRIM removes extra spaces from text, leaving only single spaces between words and no leading or trailing spaces. It is a first step in cleaning imported or pasted data.
jobUseCases: Cleaning customer names imported from a CRM that have trailing spaces
Fixing lookup failures caused by hidden spaces around employee IDs
Standardizing product codes pasted from PDFs or emails
Preparing text columns before matching, sorting, or removing duplicates
Tidying survey responses where users added accidental extra spaces

examples.title: Remove extra spaces
examples.explanation: Returns 'Amit Sharma'. TRIM strips leading and trailing spaces and collapses the multiple spaces between words into a single space.

examples.title: Clean a cell reference
examples.explanation: Cleans whatever text is in A2, useful before using it in a VLOOKUP or comparison where stray spaces would cause a mismatch.

examples.title: Fix lookups with hidden spaces
examples.explanation: Trims the lookup value in G2 so a trailing space does not break the match against the table. Spaces are a frequent cause of #N/A errors.

examples.title: Combine with CLEAN for messy imports
examples.explanation: CLEAN removes non-printable characters and TRIM removes extra spaces, together producing tidy text from data copied out of other systems.

commonMistakes: Expecting TRIM to remove spaces inside words; it only collapses runs of spaces between words
Assuming TRIM removes non-breaking spaces (CHAR 160) from web data; it does not, use SUBSTITUTE for those
Forgetting to convert the TRIM result to values with Paste Special before deleting the original column
Using TRIM on numbers and expecting them to stay numeric; TRIM always returns text
Overlooking that TRIM does not remove tabs or line breaks, which need CLEAN
practiceTips: Run TRIM on key columns before doing lookups, sorts, or duplicate removal
Pair TRIM with CLEAN to handle both extra spaces and non-printable characters
For stubborn non-breaking spaces, use SUBSTITUTE(A2, CHAR(160), " ") inside TRIM
